name: Black Bean and Chicken Chili
recipeIngredient: 6 boneless skinless chicken breast halves, cut into 1-inch pieces
1 can black beans rinsed and drained (15 to 19 oz.)
1 28 oz. can Italian plum tomatoes, cut up
recipeInstructions:
1. In a Dutch oven, sauté chicken, red peppers, onions, and garlic in oil for about 5 minutes or until the chicken is almost cooked.
2. Add chili powder, cumin, and coriander; cook for 3 minutes.
3. Stir in beans, tomatoes (with their liquid), and beer. Bring to a boil.
4. Reduce heat. Simmer for 15 minutes, uncovered, stirring frequently.
5. Reduce heat to low. Stir in cheese; continue cooking until the cheese is melted and chili is thoroughly heated.
